task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs in and navigates to the OpenEMR Calendar module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenEMR interface with the Calendar view active (Day, Week, or Month view).

task_completion.description: Agent opens the appointment creation modal and selects the correct patient and enters the reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add New Event' or appointment modal is visible. Patient field shows 'Nereida Windler'. Category or Title/Comment field contains 'Physical Therapy - Post-op Knee Rehab'.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the correct start time and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment modal, Start Time is set to '10:00' (AM) and Duration is set to '45' minutes (or End Time is 10:45).

task_completion.description: Agent configures the recurrence settings correctly (Weekly for 4 weeks).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment modal, the 'Repeats' section is active. Settings show 'Weekly', repeat every '1' week, and limit is set to '4' occurrences or an end date 3 weeks from the start.

task_completion.description: The appointment appears on the calendar at the correct time and day.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calendar view shows a saved appointment block for 'Nereida Windler' at 10:00 AM on a Tuesday. Ideally, a recurrence symbol is visible on the appointment block.

integrity.description: Agent uses the OpenEMR web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenEMR GUI, not a terminal or database command line.

integrity.description: Agent does not bypass the UI to insert data directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of SQL clients, terminal commands interacting with MySQL, or backend scripts running.

integrity.description: The workflow follows standard user interaction (Login -> Calendar -> Click Slot -> Save).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of the appointment modal being filled out, rather than the appointment magically appearing without form interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Nereida Windler. Target Appointment: Tuesdays at 10:00 AM for 45 minutes. Recurrence: Weekly for 4 occurrences. Reason: Physical Therapy - Post-op Knee Rehab.
